title: Where Are The Ores?
description: Removes Ores. Stone, Deepslate, Netherrack Now Drops Ores!
body:
### **Where Are The Ores? is a lightweight datapack that:**
- Disables ores from generating.
- Adds a chance for ores to drop when mining Stone, Deepslate, or Netherrack.

**Instead of going into caves looking for ores, now you can mine Stone, Deepslate, or Netherrack to get ores!**

# Features: 
####  • Removed ore gen
####  • Mining Stone/Deepslate in the Overworld has a chance to drop overworld ores.
#### • Mining Netherrack in the Nether has a chance to drop nether ores.
####  • Works with normal tools and enchantments.

### Why use this datapack?
  Where Are The Ores? adds realism by mining for ores instead of looking for them. Mining for just Stone, Deepslate, or Netherrack gives you ores; It's like a reward for the time spent.

# Compatibility: 
  This datapack only modifies block loot tables and worldgen files. It should work with most datapacks unless they also modify the same loot tables and worldgen files.
  ### **DONT USE WITH [HiddenOres](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hidden-ores)**

# Problems?
  Contact me on my Discord server.

# Installation (Datapack): 
####  Download the datapack.
####  Place it in the world's datapacks folder.
####  Run /reload or restart the world.
